title: MC Star Wars - Lightsabers ⚔
description:
I made Starwars MC and about Lightsaber Swords, Lightsabers can burn any mobs!
This is realistic
body:
# About

- This mod is for 1.20.1
- I made Lightsabers and Crystals as the Ore
- This is about Lightsabers with realistic damage
- Added Lightsabers has 24 damage and "Fire"
- Lightsabers will burn any mobs
- Press the Right button Mouse to make the speed and Jump higher
- Crystal ore is rare to find in a cave
- These lightsabers are pretty overpowered and a good useful

![Mob fired by Lightsaber](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eaaa676d1cacdf90c82c6676befa8c03da3b24d_0.webp)
In Minecraft, the lightsaber mod can burn any mobs

![Lightsabers burning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/131678e5efa7da20be33b7dba15517a15dc7721f.jpeg)

Those are realistic lightsabers that can burn anything that looks like.

> Real life lightsaber burn and melt metals 🔥
  
# Screenshot
Here are my screenshots for Lightsabers Mod
## Crystals
![Crystals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b15b10bf2fd5206f9f7094504de5e61ea1962919.png)
## Colors Lightsabers
![Colors Lightsabers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a45b7e71c7ed0cf2349d56ee263b625a9e628bdb.png)

# Crafting Table

![Crafting Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44cfb3dcca1e672641eba9992e6037de23e65f13.png)

# Features:

## Added Type of Lightsabers
- Red Lightsaber
- Yellow Lightsaber
- Green Lightsaber
- Blue Lightsaber
- Purple Lightsaber
##  Added Items and block
- Lightsaber Crystal Ore
- Crystals
- LGT Retractable Lightsaber
## Added Procedures

- Speed = 5
- Jump Boost = 5
>   Press Right Button Mouse

![Right Button Mouse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f19e4ac598330849a163da7c3f2f13edaa36b4d8.png)
